meta.title: Kling 3.0 Suprised Me! Compared To Veo 3.1 & Sora 2
meta.description:
Kling AI 3.0 is here! in this video I test it against Google Veo 3.1 & Sora 2
Try Kling 3.0  👉 https://higgsfield.ai?fpr=dankieft

Kling AI dropped a new version named Kling 3.0 and Kling 3.0 Omni. In this video we're having a first look at what the new features of Kling are, how it works and if it is any good. Besides that I am also comparing it against Sora 2, Google Veo 3.1 and the old version of Kling 2.6. After watching this video you will be fully up to date on what's new and if it is worth the hype! 

Join my FREE community where you can find my prompts & chat about AI
